pi_items.source: company_info.json name field and task.json description field

company_info.json bcp_requirements.required_sections array contains 8 sections: Purpose and Scope, Roles and Responsibilities, Risk Assessment and Business Impact Analysis, Recovery Strategies, Emergency Response Procedures, Communication Plan, IT Disaster Recovery, Testing and Maintenance
Typical BCP structure supports 6+ heading levels based on standard sections from ISO 22301 and industry practice
Reasonable based on having 6-8 main sections with 1-2 subsections each
README explicitly mentions 'recovery time objective table' and 'emergency contact list' (table format)
README specifies requirement for '≥ 30 paragraphs of body text' in expected end state
README task requirements state 'Include a Table of Contents' and expected end state mentions 'A Table of Contents (auto-generated, using text:table-of-content in ODT XML)'
README task requirements state 'Add page numbers in the footer' and expected end state mentions 'Footer with page numbers'
README specifies 'Save as /home/ga/Documents/Meridian_BCP_2024.odt' and setup_task.sh confirms this path

pi_items.verified_value: ISO 22301 is a real standard (ISO 22301:2019 - Business Continuity Management Systems)
pi_items.source: Web search: https://www.iso.org/standard/75106.html confirms ISO 22301 is a real, current standard

pi_items.verified_value: SOC 2 Type II is real; Availability TSC (Trust Services Criteria) is a valid criterion evaluating system availability
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed SOC 2 Type II exists with Availability as one of five trust service criteria

pi_items.verified_value: NIST SP 800-34 Rev. 1 is the current version: 'Contingency Planning Guide for Federal Information Systems'
Weehawken is a real township in Hudson County, NJ; zip code 07086 verified
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Weehawken, NJ is a real location with zip code 07086

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an ISO 22301-compliant Business Continuity Plan document for a fictitious but realistically modeled third-party logistics company, Meridian Logistics Partners, LLC, located in Weehawken, NJ. The company operates across three facilities with 312 employees and $84M revenue. The document must include at least 6 Heading 1 sections, 8 Heading 2 subsections, 2 tables, 30+ paragraphs, a Table of Contents, and page numbers in the footer. ISO 22301, SOC 2 Type II Availability Criteria, and NIST SP 800-34 are all real compliance frameworks. The document number is MLP-BCP-2024-001. Company data (personnel, systems, risk events) is entirely synthetic and provided via JSON reference file.
